label: Serper
description: Fetch real-time Google Search results via the Serper API.

form.title: Connect Serper
form.subtitle: Paste your Serper API key to enable real-time Google Search results in Anton.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste the API key from your Serper dashboard. Takes about 30 seconds — no OAuth, no setup.
methods.how_to:
## Get your Serper API key

1. Go to [serper.dev](https://serper.dev) and sign in (or create a free account).
2. After logging in, click **API Key** in the left sidebar.
3. Copy the key shown on that page.
4. Paste it into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

## Notes

- Free accounts include 2,500 queries per month. Paid plans unlock higher limits.
- The API key grants full access to your Serper account's quota — keep it secret.
- If you suspect the key is compromised, return to the Serper dashboard and regenerate it.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found at serper.dev → API Key in the left sidebar.
